description: High fashion styling on the classic block heel, giving this sandal an edgy feminine twist. The stone detailing highlights the straps with their tough fabric with a dull sheen. Wear this with anything (make sure one item in your ensemble matches the nude or black colouring on this shoe) and look good effortlessly. Heel: 3" Upper Forefoot and midfoot straps in tough fabric Fabric straps held together with a crystal encrusted pin Padded footbed with embossed branding Outsole TPR outsole with heel Textured grooves on the outsole Shoe Care Wipe surface with soft, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash or use a drier Do not store in direct sunlight
